title: westringia sericea
intro: Westringia sericea, also known as silky Westringia or Coo-yee, is a flowering shrub native to Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The leaves and flowers of Westringia sericea have been used to treat colds, fever, and respiratory issues due to their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, providing health benefits such as relief from congestion and coughs. Westringia sericea is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
